documentation_impact.rationale: This task updates the ratified Phase 4 documentation and reference surfaces so bootstrap tracking, operator guidance, and feature evidence stay aligned after human approval.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The task follows the bootstrap working agreement by staging the governance artifact locally and waiting for human ratification before advance.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The task preserves documentation and reference stewardship by recording the affected surfaces and keeping the deferred ratification work explicit.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The task keeps the phase-4 exit aligned with the product requirement for ratified and traceable delivery artifacts.
